data.title: Determinants of Online Medical Decisions for Older Parents: A Discrete Choice Experiment
data.authors: Bonan Fan, Weifang Song, Wei Zhang, Richard Evans
data.description: This study investigates determinants of adult children’s medical decision preferences for their elderly parents, aiming to optimize healthcare service utilization. Seven influencing factors were identified and a discrete choice experiment was conducted. Data were analyzed with a binary logit regression model. Results highlight treatment effectiveness (
